description_long: This is a modern, low-profile wooden cabinet with a rectangular form and a horizontal orientation. The exterior features a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish with horizontal slats on the front, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The front face appears to have two large doors or panels, one of which includes a small cutout or recessed area, likely for cable management or ventilation. The sides and top are smooth, with the wood grain pattern continuing seamlessly. This piece is well-suited for use as a media console, storage unit, or sideboard in urban environments such as living rooms, lobbies, or offices.
description: A sleek, modern wooden cabinet with horizontal slats on the front, short legs, and a rich brown finish. It features two large front panels and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal slatted design and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth wood grain and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view revealing two large panels and a small cutout, likely for cable management.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and wood texture.
